fullArticle:
Stefan Bondy: Jordan Clarkson is re-signing with the Knicks, his agent Rich Paul told The Post.

Hapoel Tel Aviv announced a major signing from the NBA for the upcoming EuroLeague season. The club officially confirmed the arrival of former Los Angeles Clippers forward Amir Coffey on a one-year deal.

Heat Central: Teams interested in LeBron James are skeptical that they can beat Cleveland’s case for LeBron, per @WindhorstESPN “What I suspect is going to be important to him is he is going to get through the regular season without having to go to extraordinary measures. Without having to play 38 minutes per game, take 25 shots. I think Philly can make a compelling case… but so can Cleveland. Can anybody make a more compelling case on the roster than Cleveland and more compelling on the home ...
